name: Red Pepper Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sun-dried tomatoes in a bowl and pour boiling water over them, covering them completely. Allow to soak for 20-30 minutes.
2. If using canned peppers, rinse and drain well, then blot on paper towels. Chop finely.
3. Combine the chopped peppers with the Kalamata olives, fresh herbs, and minced garlic.
4. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes, reserving some of the water. Gently press them in a colander to remove excess liquid.
5. Pulse the drained sun-dried tomatoes until finely chopped (avoid over-processing to maintain texture).
6. Add olive oil and balsamic vinegar; pulse again, scraping down as needed, until no large tomato pieces remain.
7. If using a food processor for other ingredients, do not blend all at once—this prevents excess moisture and maintains some texture.
8. Combine the sun-dried tomato mixture with remaining ingredients, mixing well.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning with black pepper and salt if desired.
10. If the pesto is too thick, moisten it slightly with reserved tomato water until reaching the desired consistency (between thick pesto and soft pate).
